docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $283.00 FILED BY SPILLANE,T.F. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT PERRY,GEOFFREY EUGENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SPILLANE,T.F.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SPILLANE,T.F. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT PERRY,GEOFFREY EUGENE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $678.00 FILED BY PERRY,GEOFFREY EUGENE AS TO DEFENDANT SPILLANE,T.F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-29-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03 TRIAL OF AUG-19-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERRY,GEOFFREY EUGENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPILLANE,T.F. $473.08 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $512.08, SERVICE ON X-COMPLAINT WAIVED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT SPILLANE,T.F.
